visual_description: A man in a gray suit walks forward through a dimly lit room, his right arm extended outward as if gesturing or steadying himself. Behind him, another man in a patterned shirt stands slightly to the side, partially obscured. The room features tiled walls, framed pictures, and a door with an orange decorative paper hanging on it.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking clearly without any noticeable background noise or inflection.
